winner_reason: Army A wins: Army B is broken.

final.design_basis: SAB-inspired square-grid ancients engine with facing-led movement, line-and-column groups, scaled attrition, structured combat details, march actions, screening fire, flee/pursuit, residual contact cleanup, lane-based frontage pairing, terrain-aware combat, interpenetration, and broader scenario support

B Companion Cavalry General is charging and will add impact in the next close combat resolution.

Frontage lane 3 matched B Companion Cavalry General against A Companion Cavalry I.
B Companion Cavalry General engaged A Companion Cavalry I from the front (11 vs 8).
Modifiers: B  [quality +1, general aura +1, charge impact +3, outflanked on the line -1]; A  [free flank support +1].

B Companion Cavalry General pursued from (3, 3) to (3, 4) via (3, 4).

A Tarantine Horse I turned from N to E to face lingering contact.

A Psiloi I is charging and will add impact in the next close combat resolution.

Modifiers: A  [terrain +1, outflanked on the line -1]; B  [free flank support +1].
A Psiloi II recoiled from (11, 2) to (11, 3).
A Psiloi II became disordered.
Close combat result: Psiloi I beat Psiloi II from the front -> recoil (7 vs 9).
A Psiloi I engaged B Companion Cavalry General from the side (6 vs 5).
Modifiers: A  [flank attack +1]; B  [quality +1, general aura +1, extra side contact -1].
B Companion Cavalry General had no space to recoil and was destroyed.
B Companion Cavalry General, the general, has fallen.
B morale loss +12 for Companion Cavalry General (unit lost), now 17/17.
B Phalangites I is out of command.
B Phalangites II is out of command.
B Phalangites III is out of command.
B Phalangites IV is out of command.
B Thureophoroi II is out of command.

B is shaken at 17/17 morale loss.
B begins bound 4 with 8 PIPs.
B Phalangites II charged from (8, 1) to (8, 2) against A-PK3 (front) via (8, 2).
B Phalangites II is charging and will add impact in the next close combat resolution.
B Phalangites III charged from (7, 1) to (7, 2) against A-PK2 (front) via (7, 2).
B Phalangites III is charging and will add impact in the next close combat resolution.
B Psiloi I prepared missile fire at A Psiloi II; it will resolve at end_bound.
B ended the bound.
B resolved 1 prepared missile shot.
B Psiloi I shot at A Psiloi II (6 vs 8).
The missiles caused no significant effect.
Missile result: Psiloi I vs Psiloi II at range 2 -> no_effect (6 vs 8).
Frontage lane 7 matched B Phalangites III against A Phalangites II.
B Phalangites III engaged A Phalangites II from the front (11 vs 14).
Modifiers: B  [ordered pike frontal attack +3, outflanked on the line -1]; A  [free flank support +1, ordered pike frontal defense +4].
B Phalangites III was disordered in close combat.
Close combat result: Phalangites II beat Phalangites III from the front -> disorder (11 vs 14).
Frontage lane 8 matched B Phalangites II against A Phalangites III.
B Phalangites II engaged A Phalangites III from the front (11 vs 13).
Modifiers: B  [ordered pike frontal attack +3, outflanked on the line -1]; A  [free flank support +1, ordered pike frontal defense +4].
B Phalangites II stood firm despite losing the exchange; units remain in combat while still in contact.
Close combat result: Phalangites III beat Phalangites II from the front -> no_effect (11 vs 13).
B is broken at 17/17 morale loss.
Army A wins: Army B is broken.

final.winner_reason: Army A wins: Army B is broken.
